name: Chelsea Piers Field House
about: Chelsea Piers Field House is a sports and entertainment complex located in New York City. The venue offers a variety of activities and sports facilities for individuals and groups. While the specific golf simulator details are not currently available on the website, Chelsea Piers is known for providing comprehensive recreational experiences. The Field House location focuses on creating a versatile environment for both casual visitors and serious athletes looking for quality sports facilities in an urban setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Urban location in Chelsea Piers complex
Variety of sports and entertainment options
Flexible booking options for groups and individuals

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Equipment rental is available, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, but the venue offers full kitchen and bar services

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on simulator availability and group size

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chelsea Piers Field House welcomes families and offers activities suitable for children
